text: SUPREME JUDICIAL COURT. The April term of the S. J. Court for Waldo county began to-day (Tuesday). Justice Virgin on the bench. Court was opened by prayer by Rev. Wooster Parker, of Belfast. Woodbury Fuller is the Court reporter. The juries are as follows: FIRST JURY. F. A. Dickey, Northport, foreman; David Alexander, Belfast; Shepard Blanchard, Stockton; D. W. Bennett, Montville; J. H. Brown, Knox; Henry B. Coombs, Islesboro; Elisha W. Ellis, Searsmont; Joseph F. Fernald, Troy; Eli W. Gilbert, Belfast; Augustus G. Goodling, Brooks; Benjamin H. Grant, Winterport; Orrin B. Gray, Prospect. SECOND JURY. Harrington Osgood, Palermo, foreman; Warren Gerrish, Burnham; W. J. Heal, Belmont; Samuel Kingsbury, Waldo; Fred Knowlton, Liberty; Israel Massey, Unity; James W. Nash, Belfast; W. H. Sweet, Searsport; William S. Shaw, Winterport; [William Sibley, Freedom;] James Severance, Searsmont; J. Fred Tobey, Searsport. SUPERNUMERARY. Nathan T. Woodman, Monroe.

The following are the transfers in real estate, in Waldo County, for the week ending May 13th -- Josiah Bigelow, Burnham, to Susan Bigelow, same town. A. D. Bumps, Thorndike, to Edwin Conforth, same town. Daniel S. Bray, Frankfort, to Anna L. Crockett, same town. Enson Benson, Frankfort, to Simeon J. Crockett, same town. Hannah P. Crowell, Troy, to Joseph F. Fernald, Troy. Mary A. Dodge, Islesboro, to Horace F. Hanson, [same town]. Wallace M. Ellis & ux., Swanville, to [F.] Scribner, Searsport. Ellis C. Freeman, [...ville], to W. E. Lewis, Boston. David P. [...], Belfast, to H. H. Carter, Jr., same town. [...], Burnham, to A. W. Fletcher, [same town].

names_mentioned: Mr. and Mrs. S. F. Files
text: THORNDIKE. ... Mr. and Mrs. S. F. Files and infant daughter, who have been visiting at V. N. [Hig]gins, returned to their home in Bangor, Nov. 3d.

type: real estate transfer notice (Waldo Land Deals)
text: WALDO LAND DEALS. Real Estate Transfers Recorded in the Registry of Deeds. ... Mark B. Elwell, Boston, to Alban F. Elwell, Northport; land in Northport. Joseph F. Fernald, Troy, to Medwin J. Fernald, Troy; land and buildings in South Troy. George W. Fish, Palermo, to Augustus M. Benner, Portland; land and buildings in Palermo.

place: Centre Montville / Searsmont / Camden, Waldo Co., Maine
type: local correspondent social note (Centre Montville column)
text: CENTRE MONTVILLE. ... Morrill Meservey returned last week from a visit to friends in [Searsmont a]nd Camden.
